overview.description: The ProShares Ultra 7-10 Year Treasury (UST) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Treasury (7-10 Y) index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to an index that tracks the daily performance of US Treasury bonds with remaining maturities between 7 and 10 years. UST was launched on Jan 19, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
